[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100000 1
1 00101011 4
2 01011110 5
3 11000000 2
4 00011111 5
5 00001010 2
6 00101001 3
7 11001011 5

01 10 01011111 6
12 21 11001111 6
23 32 11001011 5 match 7
34 43 11101011 6
45 54 00101010 3
56 65 11111111 a
67 76 11111101 7
70 07 11111101 7
